headline: Cramer Says Skip Klarna Despite Buy-Now-Pay-Later Buzz
summary: Jim Cramer just handed investors a clear pecking order in the payments space, and if you own Klarna, pay attention. Following a major Bank of America rollout covering five names in payments and buy-now-pay-later, Cramer laid out exactly where he stands. BofA likes all five.
